title: Science, Technology and Innovation Policy 2020: A Way Forward

summary.about: A review of India’s proposed science, technology and innovation policy and the reforms needed around it.
summary.audience: Science ministries, universities, research institutions and innovation-policy leaders.
summary.method: Policy commentary comparing India’s R&D investment and consultation framework with international practice.
summary.insights: India needs higher R&D investment, inclusive consultation and stronger links among health, education, industry and research.
